_comment: Versioned scenario engine configuration. Changes require Amir + Alex alignment. See docs/architecture/03-scenario-engine.md §8.2
_comment_approval: Second-approval gate. Supervisor sign-off required when recommended scenario final_score_eur >= threshold OR execution_complexity === HIGH. Set to 0 to require second approval on every decision.
_comment_harbor: Harbor congestion modifier weight. Multiplied by harbor_congestion_signal (0.0-1.0) from James' model to produce additive WAIT risk modifier boost.
